mechanics.excerpt: You did well enough in your advanced training move into special forces where you became good friends with Manu Sharma_ Sharma later left Capellan service t0 help form the Heavy Hell Raisers new merce- nary unit; your friendship with him gives you ties t0 mercenary circles_ The invasion tne Federated Commonwealth'$ Sarna March per- suaded you become covert operative to further the war effort; Your ties t0 Firmir Commercial and your knowledge tri-vid projectors allowed you become entertainment salesman in the Disputed Territories, providing invaluable aid to Zhanzeng Guang terror- ists in overthrowing local governments After your superiors cut your mission short, you imme diately signed up for operations against the St Ives Compact, swept up in the Xin Sheng movement along with the rest the Capellan Confederation_ Your heroic efforts saved your unit when your commanding officer died fighting against the Second St.
